description: Define `hudu-integration` feature flag and a server-side guard (mirrors requireEntraUiFlagEnabled) that requires EE + flag, returning 404/501 otherwise
Add client-side `useFeatureFlag('hudu-integration')` gating helper for Hudu UI surfaces
Create EE route skeleton under ee/server/src/app/api/integrations/hudu with shared _guards.ts and _responses.ts helpers
Create CE stub routes under server/src/app/api/integrations/hudu that lazy-import @enterprise impl and return eeUnavailable() 501 in CE
Create ee/server/src/lib/integrations/hudu module folder with barrel index and contracts.ts (TypeScript types for company, asset, article, asset_password)
Hudu API client: axios instance built from base URL with x-api-key header injection
Credential resolution: tenant secret (hudu_api_key/hudu_base_url) then env fallback
Pagination helper that fetches all pages (25/page) and stops when a page returns < 25 items
Rate-limit handling: on 429 honor Retry-After + jitter, retry with a capped attempt count
Typed error mapping for 401/403/404/422/429/5xx into a discriminated result type
Resource-name mapping so callers use domain names while the client hits asset_passwords/procedures/etc.
validateConnection(): GET /companies?page=1 returning ok + detected password-access capability (probe asset_passwords for 403)
Never log API key or password values; redact in any error surfaced from the client

EE migration (ee/server/migrations) creating hudu_integrations (tenant, integration_id PK, base_url, is_active, connected_at, last_synced_at, settings jsonb, timestamps) with on_update_timestamp trigger, following the Entra EE schema precedent
Citus distribution of hudu_integrations by tenant (isCitusEnabled guard, create tenant uuid first, transaction:false)
Unique constraint enforcing one Hudu connection per tenant
Model/repository for hudu_integrations (get, upsert, setActive, touchLastSynced)
huduConnectionActions.connect: store base_url + api_key in secret provider, upsert hudu_integrations active
huduConnectionActions.test: validate current/candidate credentials and return status + capability
huduConnectionActions.getStatus: return connection state without exposing the api key
huduConnectionActions.disconnect: delete secrets, mark inactive, retain mappings

EE-only deletion boundary: all DELETE/cleanup of hudu_integrations (disconnect + client-/tenant-delete cascade) lives in EE code paths and EE migrations; CE never references the EE-only table. Hudu mapping cleanup operates only on the shared CE tenant_external_entity_mappings table
Add 'IT Documentation' category to IntegrationsSettingsPage.tsx categories with a single Hudu item (isEE:true), hidden unless EE + flag
HuduIntegrationSettings component: base URL field, masked API key field (write-only), Test, Connect, Disconnect
Connection status badge (Not connected / Connected / Error) with detected instance + password-access indicator
API key input never round-trips the stored value to the client; submitting blank keeps existing key
Inline validation + error toasts for invalid base URL (404) and invalid key (401)
huduCompanyMappingActions.syncHuduCompanies: fetch all Hudu companies and cache the list for mapping
Auto-suggest matcher: id_in_integration==client_id (exact) then exact name then fuzzy name, returning a suggestion + source/confidence
Persist mappings in tenant_external_entity_mappings (integration_type='hudu', alga_entity_type='client', external_entity_id=hudu_company_id, metadata)
Enforce one-to-one: a Hudu company maps to at most one client and vice versa within a tenant
getHuduCompanyMappings: return Hudu companies joined with current mapping + suggestion + mapped client name

setHuduCompanyMapping / clearHuduCompanyMapping server actions writing tenant_external_entity_mappings directly, gated on system_settings (NOT the billing_settings-gated externalMappingActions wrappers)
Resolve a client_id -> Hudu company id (and reverse) helper for downstream data fetch
HuduCompanyMappingManager component modeled on NinjaOne OrganizationMappingManager (counters, table, Refresh companies)
Per-row AlgaPSA client picker pre-filled with the suggested match; selecting persists immediately
Status badges per row (Suggested / Mapped / Unmapped) and mapped/unmapped counters
Refresh companies button re-pulls Hudu companies and recomputes suggestions without losing confirmed mappings
huduDataActions.getCompanyAssets(client_id): resolve mapping, fetch Hudu assets by company_id (paginated)
huduDataActions.getCompanyArticles(client_id): fetch Hudu articles by company_id
huduDataActions.getCompanyPasswords(client_id): fetch Hudu asset_passwords metadata by company_id (no value fields retained)
Short-lived per-(tenant,company,resource) server cache with manual invalidation on Refresh
Strip/never-return password value fields from getCompanyPasswords payloads (name/username/url/id only)
Build per-record Hudu deep links (per-resource url + /companies/jump fallback)
Surface 403-no-password-permission as a typed state from getCompanyPasswords (not an error crash)
revealHuduPassword(client_id, hudu_password_id): single live GET of one asset_password, return the value transiently to the caller, never persist it (DB/Vault/cache) or log it
Audit every password reveal (who, when, which password/company); audit entry never contains the value
Client detail 'Hudu' tab host registered (visible only when EE+flag and client is mapped + connected)
Assets section: list name/type/serial with deep-link and count
Articles section: list title/folder with deep-link and count
Tab Refresh button and empty/error states (not connected / unmapped / unreachable)
Hudu source attribution shown on the tab
Add a dedicated 'Passwords' tab to the Client detail page (separate from the Hudu tab), visible only when EE+flag AND Hudu connected AND client mapped
Client Passwords tab lists the mapped company's Hudu asset_passwords (name/username/url) with a count (metadata only, no values)
Each password row supports inline Reveal via live GET (masked/reveal-on-click, audited, never persisted to DB/Vault/cache) plus an Open-in-Hudu link
Client Passwords tab empty/error states for unmapped client / disconnected / no password permission
Gate all Hudu server entry points on the existing system_settings RBAC resource (read=view surfaced data, update=connect/disconnect/manage mappings); no new resource, no seeding
Apply EE + flag guard and system_settings RBAC checks to every Hudu server action and route
Add translation keys for all Hudu UI strings (settings, mapping, tabs, empty/error states)
